HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[cross-tenant] Reviewing outside-tenant trust, delegated management, and tenant policy cues that most change control or pivot paths.
ho-azure cross-tenant

╭───────────────────────────┬─────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ signal                    │ type        │ tenant                                               │ scope                                              │ posture                                                                                │ attack path            │ why it matters                                                                                                                                        │
├───────────────────────────┼─────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Contoso baseline ops      │ lighthouse  │ Contoso Corp. (33333333-3333-3333-3333-333333333333) │ subscription::22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222 │ priority=high; strongest=Owner; eligible=1; delegated-role-assign=yes                  │ control via lighthouse │ managed by Contoso Corp.; strongest role Owner; 1 eligible authorization(s)                                                                           │
│ external-ci-bridge        │ external-sp │ 66666666-6666-6666-6666-666666666666                 │ tenant                                             │ priority=high; roles=Owner; assignments=2; scopes=1                                    │ pivot via external-sp  │ Service principal 'external-ci-bridge' appears to be owned by another tenant and holds high-impact Azure role assignments in the current environment. │
│ Authorization Policy      │ policy      │ 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111                 │ tenant                                             │ priority=high; guest-invites=everyone; app-registration=yes; user-consent=self-service │ entry via policy       │ guest invites: everyone; users can register apps; self-service permission grant policies assigned; legacy MSOL PowerShell blocked                     │
│ Fabrikam platform support │ lighthouse  │ Fabrikam Ops (44444444-4444-4444-4444-444444444444)  │ resource-group::rg-platform                        │ priority=low; strongest=Contributor; eligible=0                                        │ control via lighthouse │ managed by Fabrikam Ops; strongest role Contributor                                                                                                   │
╰───────────────────────────┴─────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Takeaway: 4 cross-tenant signal(s) visible; 3 high priority, 2 delegated management, 1 externally owned service principal, and 1 tenant policy cue.
